parameters.query: INSERT INTO dedup_cache (hash) VALUES ('{{ $json.hash }}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; SELECT COUNT(*) as is_new FROM dedup_cache WHERE hash='{{ $json.hash }}' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '60 seconds';

INSERT INTO users (chat_id, first_name, username, status) VALUES ({{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.chatId }}, '{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.firstName }}', '{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.username }}', 'pending') ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO NOTHING; SELECT status FROM users WHERE chat_id={{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.chatId }};

parameters.text: ✅ ได้รับคำขอแล้วครับ กรุณารอการอนุมัติจาก Jeff

parameters.query: UPDATE users SET status='{{ $json.newStatus }}', approved_at=NOW() WHERE chat_id={{ $json.targetId }}; SELECT chat_id, first_name, status FROM users WHERE chat_id={{ $json.targetId }};

parameters.text: ={{ $json.status === 'approved' ? '✅ ได้รับอนุมัติแล้วครับ! ส่งข้อความมาได้เลย' : '❌ ขออภัย คำขอถูกปฏิเสธครับ' }}

parameters.query: SELECT status FROM users WHERE chat_id={{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.chatId }} LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO inbox_log (user_id, content_raw, content_clean, lang_detected, msg_hash, agent, status) VALUES ({{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.userId }}, '{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.text }}', '{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.text }}', '{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.isThai ? 'th' : 'en' }}', '{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.hash }}', '{{ $('L2.5 Normalize Output').first().json.agent }}', 'ok');

parameters.text: ❌ คุณยังไม่ได้รับอนุมัติครับ กรุณาส่ง /start เพื่อสมัครก่อน

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as blocked FROM blocked_ips WHERE ip = '{{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.body.message.from.id.toString() }}' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW());

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "model": "gemini-2.0-flash", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are the COPREM Smart Router. Classify every incoming message. Output STRICT JSON ONLY — no prose, no explanation. Output format: {\"pillar\":\"JOB|PERSONAL|CREATIVE\",\"domain\":\"marketing|ops|trading|brand|fiction\",\"confidence\":0.0,\"hitl_required\":false,\"hitl_reason\":null,\"translated_en\":\"english version\"} HITL_REQUIRED=true IF: trade size>1% risk, content publishing, system config change, irreversible action. Default to JOB if unclear."}, {"role": "user", "content": "{{ $('L1-A Preprocessor').first().json.text }}"}], "max_tokens": 200, "temperature": 0 }

parameters.text: Got it. This question needs a closer look — I will follow up with you shortly.
ไม่แน่ใจว่าต้องการอะไรครับ 🤔 กรุณาระบุเพิ่มเติมครับ

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ pillar: $('L3 Inject Context').first().json.pillar, query: ($('L3 Inject Context').first().json.text || '').substring(0, 100), kb_miss: $('L3 Inject Context').first().json.kb_miss }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT content, pillar, kb_id, 1 - (embedding_768 <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM memory_embeddings
WHERE embedding_768 IS NOT NULL AND archived = false
ORDER BY embedding_768 <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 5;
